title: Better Balls
description: Makes all of the spherical items in Minecraft much cleaner with cool new textures!
body:
![Pack Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04486db9f634da87735eb07282909f94f8c91b1e.png)
# Description
This pack changes the textures of all of the sperical items to be much cleaner and larger, with better shading and pixel art in general. With 9 texture changes, this pack makes these items feel nicer and more integrated with vanilla Minecraft.

**This pack does NOT use [Rappenm's](https://modrinth.com/user/Rappenem) textures!**

## List of included items
- Clay Ball
- Eye of Ender
- Ender Pearl
- Fire Charge
- Heart of the Sea
- Magma Cream
- Slime ball
- Snowball
- Wind Charge

### **Used By [Yrrah](https://www.youtube.com/@Yrrah908)!**
